name: Sullivan Bank
description_short: Sullivan Bank is a community-focused FDIC-insured bank operating across Missouri with personal and business accounts, lending, and digital banking services.
description_long:
Sullivan Bank is a regional financial institution headquartered in Sullivan, Missouri, with a history of community involvement and local operations. The bank operates 11 locations across Missouri (including full-service branches and ATM-only sites) and serves both personal and business customers with traditional banking products and services.

The bank offers a comprehensive range of personal banking services including checking accounts, savings accounts, and certificates of deposit (CDs). Their flagship product is the Priority Plus Checking account, which offers 5.00% monthly interest on balances up to $25,000 (subject to qualification). On the lending side, Sullivan Bank provides mortgages with a dedicated Mortgage Center, personal loans, and credit report services. Business customers can access business checking, savings, CDs, SBA loans, and treasury management services. Digital capabilities include mobile banking, online account enrollment, Zelle integration, and secure email messaging.

Sullivan Bank distinguishes itself through strong community commitment, having donated over $125,000 and contributed 7,500+ volunteer hours to 150+ charities and organizations since 2022. The bank emphasizes a "360 Experience" combining personal, business, digital, and in-person service. They highlight FDIC insurance backing, competitive deposit rates, and accessible customer service with real people available when needed. The bank also offers financial calculators, online tutorials, and branch/ATM locators for customer convenience.

As a regional bank, Sullivan Bank is best suited for customers in Missouri seeking community-oriented banking with competitive deposit rates and traditional lending products. The bank's strength lies in personal service and local market knowledge, though as a smaller institution it may have more limited products and services compared to national banks. Customers should confirm specific offerings and current rates directly, as competitive rates and terms can change. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Personal checking accounts including Priority Plus Checking (5.00% APY)
Savings accounts and certificates of deposit (CDs)
Mortgage lending with dedicated Mortgage Center and rate relief programs
Mobile banking and online account management
Secure email messaging for confidential communications
Treasury management services for business customers
Online tutorials, financial calculators, and branch/ATM locator tools
pros: Priority Plus Checking offers 5.00% monthly interest on balances up to $25,000 with no monthly service fees (subject to qualification)
FDIC-insured accounts backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
11 branch and ATM locations across Missouri for physical access
Strong community commitment with $125,132+ donated and 7,500+ volunteer hours since 2022
Comprehensive digital banking including mobile app, online enrollment, Zelle, and secure email
Full-service offerings including mortgages, business loans, SBA loans, and treasury management
Dedicated Mortgage Center with online rate tools and FAQ resources
cons: Limited geographic footprint - operates only in Missouri with 11 locations, not suitable for multi-state customers
Downtown Sullivan branch now operates by appointment only (lobby access limited)
Penny withdrawal limited to $10 per day with plans to round cash transactions to nearest nickel
No information provided about overdraft fees, minimum balance requirements, or full rate schedules on website
No mention of competitive rates comparison or rate guarantees versus other regional/national banks
best_for: Missouri residents seeking community-focused banking with local branch access
Customers qualifying for Priority Plus Checking who want competitive deposit rates without monthly fees
Small business owners needing SBA loans, treasury management, and local business banking relationships
Homebuyers in Missouri seeking mortgage services with dedicated lender support
diagnosis: Sullivan Bank is best for Missouri customers seeking a community-oriented regional bank with competitive deposit rates and personalized service. The main caveat is geographic limitation—this bank only serves Missouri and has limited locations, making it unsuitable for customers needing multi-state access or those outside Missouri.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
